defense.critical_failure: The creature takes double damage and full persistent damage, and the claw moves it up to 20 feet in a direction of your choice.
defense.failure: The creature takes full damage and persistent damage, and the claw moves it up to 10 feet in a direction of your choice.
defense.success: The creature takes half damage and no persistent damage, and the claw moves it up to 5 feet in a direction of your choice.

heightened.text: The initial damage increases by 2d8, and the persistent acid damage increases by 1d6.

spell.name: Acid Grip
spell.text: An ephemeral, taloned hand grips the target, burning it with magical acid. The target takes 2d8 acid damage plus 1d6 persistent acid damage depending on its Reflex save. A creature taking persistent damage from this spell takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds.

traits.name: Acid
traits.text: Effects with this trait deal acid damage. Creatures with this trait have a connection to magical acid.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.
